hero.title: Tonoa tētahi kaupapa wātea
hero.lead: Ka arotakehia e te IATF nga tono mo nga kaupapa urunga e ahu mai ana i te hiahia pono.
support: Kāore koe e hiahia ana ki ngā whakaritenga katoa. He raruraru mārama, ko wai e pā ana, me te aha e mea nui ai hei tīmatanga.

intro: Ka uru ngā ara katoa ki te arotake kotahi.

items.label: Paetukutuku
items.body: Whakamahia te puka i raro nei hei tuku i tētahi tono kua whakaritea.

items.label: Īmēra
items.body: Tukuna te tono ki {{contact.requestsEmail}}Ka taea e ngā tono īmēra te noho hei pūkete tono tūmatanui i muri i te arotake me te whakawātea.

items.label: Te whakahē
items.body: Tīmata ki reira mēnā he māmā ake. Ka neke tonu te tono ki te arotake kotahi.

guidance.title: I mua i te tuku tono
paragraphs: IATF mahi i roto i te tūmatanui. Ka taea te whakarāpopoto tono, ka whakaputaina rite pūkete tono tūmataiti i te whakahaere GitHub IAT F, i runga i tenei paetukutuku, ranei e rua.

Kaua e whakaurua ngā wāhitau tūmataiti, ngā tau waea, ngā taipitopito hauora, ngā mōhiohio tautuhi rānei mō ngā kaiwhakamahi takitahi o ngā hangarau āwhina ki te kore e tika, ā, e pai ana koe ki te arotake a te IATF.
Ka tangohia e te IATF nga taipitopito whakapā whaiaro e kore e hiahiatia i mua i te whakaputa i nga rekoata tono.

review.title: Ngā tūmanako arotake
paragraphs: Ko te tuku tono ehara i te mea ka whakaaetia.
Ka arotakehia e te IATF nga tono mo te tika o te misioni, te whaihua, te whai hua, me te mea kei roto te mahi i roto i te whare putunga a te iwi.
Ko etahi tono ka whakakahoretia, ka whakaroa, ka whakarerekehia ranei i mua i te whakaaetanga.

fields.name: kaitono
fields.label: Ko tō ingoa, he whakahaere rānei

fields.name: whakapāRoute
fields.label: Te ara whakapā e manakohia ana

fields.name: Ngā taipitopito whakapā
fields.label: Ngā taipitopito whakapā
fields.helper: Wāhitau īmēra, Discord rānei mō te aroturuki.

fields.name: te reo
fields.label: Ko te reo
fields.helper: Ko tō reo e manakohia ana, mēnā e tika ana.

fields.name: raruraru
fields.label: He aha te raruraru e ngana ana koe ki te whakaoti?
fields.helper: Whakamāramatia te arai i roto i te reo mārama.

fields.name: extraTuhinga o mua
fields.label: He horopaki anō
fields.helper: Tukuna atu ētahi atu mea e āwhina ana ki te whakamārama i te hiahia: he aha te take, ngā tauira, ngā tohutoro, tētahi whakaaro pūmanawa pakeke, ngā herenga wā rānei.

fields.name: openSourceWhakaaetanga
fields.label: He pai ki a koe te whanaketanga puna tuwhera tūmatanui?
fields.helper: Ko nga kaupapa i whakaaetia he putunga tūmatanui i raro i te IATF.
options: Kāore au i te tino mōhio

header.title: He aha te tikanga o te whakaaetanga

items: he whare putunga tūmatanui i roto i te whakahaere IATF GitHub
he kaipūkaha kawenga i whakaritea ki te kaupapa
he raihana copyleft mō te waehere me ngā rauemi kaupapa
whanaketanga tūmatanui i roto i te putunga
he rārangi rēhita i runga i te pae IATF

header.title: He tono poto, mārama hoki hei tīmatanga

paragraphs: Mēnā he hiahia tūturu tōu mō te āheitanga, ā, e whakaaro ana koe me noho hei kaupapa tūmatanui, tukuna mai ki a mātou.
